name: Vela
long_description:
Vela is general intelligence for scheduling. We replace $100K+ coordinators by handling multi-stakeholder, cross-timezone scheduling with human-level nuance: knowing which meetings to prioritize, writing back with taste, and booking materially faster at scale.

Gobhanu and Saatvik are brothers who scaled a microfinance bank to 77 countries as kids. We previously built at AWS ML + SuperCompute and BCG AI.
one_liner: AI Scheduling Coordinators for Staffing and Recruiting
